title: Planet Labs Surpasses Expectations in Q2 Earnings Call
text: Planet Labs delivered strong Q2 results, surpassing Wall Street expectations on both revenue and earnings metrics. Revenue of $73.4 million exceeded consensus by 11%, beating estimates of $66.07 million. The company achieved adjusted EBITDA profitability of $6.4 million, marking the third consecutive quarter of profitability on this adjusted basis. Defense and intelligence revenues grew 41% year-over-year, demonstrating accelerating government demand. The company's backlog surged 245% to $736.1 million, providing exceptional revenue visibility for future periods. Free cash flow reached $54.3 million year-to-date with a 39% margin. Planet Labs stock surged 18.07% in premarket trading following the announcement. The company raised full-year guidance to $281-289 million in revenue, reflecting strong H2 momentum and improved visibility into government budgets.
